reviews.review_description: What a great find! I have completed both chapters and really enjoyed them both! A few wonky bits related to mechanics, but nothing off putting. I found it just added to the charm. I loved the stories, the atmosphere, the music/sound, the main character... just.. all of it! It was all very good! And then to find out that it was all created by one guy! Amazing! This is exactly the kind of thing that restores my awe and wonder in the human race. Good on you Dev!!!! So yes. I recommend this game. Don't wait for a sale. It's very fairly priced. Some advice. Don't forget to check out the computer in the office and the shooting range. I hope that the next episode will be out soon. If it already is, I will hunt it down and I will get it. If it's not, I am watching for it (hint hint). Thank you for such a fun game!!

developer_response.body: WOW! Thanks so much for the amazing review! I am beyond happy that you loved it. Case Files 2 is still in the works, but is bigger and thus taking longer haha Again thanks so much for your support and your review! Appreciated.

reviews.review_description: I really enjoy playing this game, it can be difficult sometimes to figure out what to do at times but overall fun game. I'm now stuck trying to figure out how to get into apartment 203. I have tried and tried, please help!!!

developer_response.body: Hey there! I am so glad you are loving the game. Hop on over to my Discord: https://discord.gg/cunU94fSxU and I am more than willing to help out, either ask in the channel or DM me when you join. Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: I'm in the 2nd chapter shadows of the past I only can find 4 caps and I need 6 to continue the game I been stuck for days cannot continue very disappointed

developer_response.body: Sorry you are stuck but instead of a 1 star review you could of reached out to support and I would of gladly helped you. Please visit my Discord: https://discord.gg/tu5zkUDwtq Lets get you back on track.

reviews.review_description: This game is really very good, but it’s really hard and I don’t know what to do half the time…or I’m stupid. I need a walkthrough somewhere. I need the answer to the safe

developer_response.body: Haha thanks much for the kinds words, and yes the game does NOT hold hands at all, But we are here to help, you can visit my Discord here: https://discord.gg/tu5zkUDwtq and I will be more than happy to help you. Talk soon ;)

reviews.review_description: I remember playing police quest years ago, and when I heard that this game was similar, I was so excited because I absolutely loved police quest. This game really didn't disappoint me. I enjoyed the puzzles. I enjoyed the suspense. I wish there were more than 2 levels to play. But I saw that there may be other ones in development. So I can't wait for them to come out. The only thing I think I would change would be the loading screen where the pictures come at you. I just keep my eyes closed so I don't have to see it because it can be kind of blinding. I do wish there was a hint button to help with some of the puzzles because they were a little difficult at times. And just for the record, I did play sitting down, and it wasn't an issue.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for your awesome and constructive review! It's appreciated. Yes Case Files 2 is in development and it is much bigger, as a solo dev this is why it's taking some time to come out hahaha. In CF2, it features an all new Core engine with a massive upgrade to the player allowing for even better sitting down and locomotion experiences. As for the flying images I am assuming you're referring to the logos when the game launches? Noted* Thanks again for playing and your support!

reviews.review_description: Do not get me wrong good idea for a game, but from my experience. This game is not worth $10. If you like to sit down while you play do not buy this game because from where your boundary is set to the floor, the floor in the game is lower than that and you are unable to touch buttons or pick up items like a key or your case that your suppose to keep you. The part in the first case where you need a key to get into apartment 202 won’t unlock and if you let go of the key it falls to the ground and you can not pick it back up. Also, when you have it set to standing your avatar is super short and you are in the ground and if you set it to sitting down that’s when you are to tall to pick up thing or touch the hint buttons. So I advise y’all not to waste your money until the game is fixed. I would like my money back.

developer_response.body:
Hello there, There is a height adjustment button on the watch, you can crouch with a button. The game is designed to be played standing up not sitting due to the nature of this game and the actions you will need to perform.

Also you assume that key you found is for the apartment which is incorrect. This game does NOT hold hands at all, you have to listen to everything David says as it holds crucial information, also think about things you encountered before e.t.c There's always a solution. Again this is designed to be HARD. The key can indeed be picked up if you drop it, so you're issue must be because you're playing while sitting down. I always encourage people to contact me on the discord if they are stuck / troubleshoot:  https://discord.gg/6D8TxzTQHX Anyway sorry to hear about your experience, if you have not refunded, feel free to reach out as I am more than willing to help. Take care.

reviews.review_description:
Lighting levels are weird - and I say this because I'm used to working with art and light being in it. Leading up to Apt 20x (x being any number), the lights seem to be on when you walk the corridors round the apartments, but the level of light that shows up on the surrounding environment doesn't match up to the light level on the ceiling coming from the lights. This is an uncomfortable eyestrain experience. 
Then there's the saving. I save progress, or think I have, but in actual fact I'm left to repeatedly save the game after I've found the key, open the box, got the other key,  but all I have actually saved is getting buzzed in. This is vexing as well.
With those being fixed, it would be a great game.

developer_response.body: That is odd, as you unlock the apartment (202) and when you enter and save the game,  the main entrance door should not make you buzz in again. Head over to my discord please for support: https://discord.gg/tu5zkUDwtq

reviews.review_description: I LOVE this game! I have been spending hours playing this game and I can’t get enough. Well worth the price…can’t wait for Case Files 2! Thank you for making this awesome adventure game!

developer_response.body: I am so pleased that you enjoyed the game! Makes me happy to see adventurers cracking the case! Thanks ever so much for your support! Drop on by my discord and say hi and to see what's in development.

reviews.review_description: The first case is a challenging but extremely fun CSI mission but the second throws you into a horror movie that’s a just as challenging and quite scary. I’m stuck right now so I’m assuming there’s CSI at some point in this case but I couldn’t say. All in all a very very under-appreciated game made with love and detail.

developer_response.body: Wow thanks for the awesome review! I am glad you're enjoying it. More to come soon, just finishing off the core code on Case Files 2 before I replace the developer art with the games art. If you need help or want to be kept up to date on CF 2 please visit my discord: https://discord.gg/tu5zkUDwtq Hope to see you there.

reviews.review_description: I have to say that this game seems like it might be cool, but I have a disability where I’m always seated. I adjust the thingy but I cannot reach anything. I’m either too big or too small. I’m still at the beginning trying to be the right height to use the key. I would have thought this issue would have come up before the game went on sale.

developer_response.body: Hello, I would love to see what I can do to accommodate you. Please head over to my discord here: https://discord.gg/aNWAu4p8kE so I can ask you some questions and dig deeper into the issue you are having so I can make your game experience more enjoyable. I fixed a bug in the last update that addresses height issues, but alas catering to all needs is a challenge I am more than up for it! But in order to do that I need to talk to you.  I hope to see you there!  Take care.

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome. It really makes you think. Graphics are great and the story line is wonderful! You definitely need to try this one. I’ll be getting anything this developer does!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the glowing review! I really appreciate it! Case Files: The Riverside Slasher and Maria: Darkness Within are in development. Will be dropping new about that VERY soon! Thanks again. Take care.

reviews.review_description: Can someone please help me every time I try and play the main game it just keeps bringing me back to the main oculus menu I have tried Uninstalling and reinstalling several times but no good any would be very much appreciated thanks. I'm still on the quest 1 incase it matters thanks

developer_response.body: UPDATE: I have narrowed down why it is crashing for QUEST 1 users ONLY, Quest 2 is fine and plays as expected. It is due to memory on the Q1. I am working on a solution for that issue now that I have pinpointed the problem. - Hello; Please visit my Discord here: https://discord.gg/aNWAu4p8kE I am starting to feel the crashing is only happening on Quest 1 as no one with a Quest 2 encounters this, App Lab does not allow us to set which device is supported, unlike the Official store which needs to be allowed IMO. But please come there and let's see if I can remedy this. Thanks much!

reviews.review_description: Very realistic play, tons to do and figure out. I’ve played a handful of games and this one so far is my favorite!

developer_response.body: Thanks very much! So glad you enjoyed it. More content coming soon.

reviews.review_description: Hi great story ,graphics  and mechanics excellent..but where is story 2. Long time coming !!!

developer_response.body: Hello, Thanks for the review. I know Episode 2 is taking longer than expected, my family and I were hit with a super typhoon at the start of the year and have been working to get  back to normal ever since, then hit with a flood 3 weeks ago, so 2022 has been a bad year. BUT with all of that said and finally behind us, I am working away on the project and have a crazy massive update coming very soon! That takes the game to the next level. As a solo dev, a game such as this is a massive under taking, but I assure you that it is well into development and will be worth the wait. When you get the new update soon you will understand why it has taken so long ;) To be up to date and also have your voice / feedback heard visit my Discord here: https://discord.gg/aNWAu4p8kE Which I am very active in. Thanks again.

reviews.review_title: This game is one of the best!!!
reviews.review_description: I give it a 4 star for some things being a little too misunderstanding. Hard to figure out. I had to YouTube the box at the beginning and maybe two other things. Still think the game is great. Great interaction. For the most part the graphics are great. Some things could be better. Would be really cool to add more chasing arresting and shootouts but I’ll take it for what it is now. I love, love, love the game so far haven’t passed level 1. Have three clues to fine. (Update) I completed level 1. Got all of my clues and finished loved it! So excited to see the next episode. I was a little upset when we couldn’t start the second one. Thought it was already out. But that’s fine. Something to look forward to. Also I want to add this tiny bit huge detail I thought was AMAZING! Your watch actually tell you THE CURRENT REAL LIFE TIME as does all the clocks in the game!!!! That’s so amazing. I’ve actually been waiting on a game to do that so that You don’t have to pause to check the time. Many kudos to the dev for throwing that in. Also the funny note on the credits paper in my office. Great game man and I’m proud of you. Keep up the amazing work!!

developer_response.body: Awesome I am so glad to hear you are enjoying it! It is a no holding hands type adventure. The box has stumped many so do not feel to bad. Once you figure it out though it is kinda a kick to the gut at how easy it really is ;) I am a solo dev so I am always trying to improve upon e.t.c, I know it has not been updated in a while because I am hard at work on episode 2. Episode 3 and beyond is also planned. If you need ANY help or want to be kept up to date on the latest news e.t.c please visit my discord here: https://discord.gg/aNWAu4p8kE and either myself or my community of awesome adventurers will be more than willing to help! Thanks again for your support! More to come! Updated Reply: Wow so happy you loved it! Yea the clock was put in there for that exact reason :) I hate playing a game in VR and lose track of time ;) Now you won't ;) Episode 2 is coming ASAP working hard on it!

reviews.review_title: U CAN SAVE YOUR GAME??!! ok, much better
reviews.review_description:
I love this game. I think most people will too.
I get frustrated with games that have puzzles BUT YOU CAN SAVE!!!
I didn't realize this.

DO THE TUTORIAL, PAY ATTENTION and you'll be fine.

The developer on this game works harder than pretty much anybody on here and takes a lot of crap from people like me lol So they deserve the praise.

I was so mad lol, It took me forever to figure out how to get through this puzzle for some weird reason even though it's kind of easy, and then I didn't beat the next puzzle and didn't know I could save it
So I thought I had to do it all over and just kind of gave up on the game.
THANK GOD The developer personally messaged me and let me know I can save it.

AWESOME concept
AWESOME game
still in developmental stages I think so to speak but it's only going to get better.
Play the game and get one a discord so that these developers can hear feedback and get better and better and better.
EVERY GAME SHOULD DO THIS

thanks for putting up with me buddy

developer_response.body: No worries I am glad that you're back to liking it. LOADS more content coming! Take care.

reviews.review_description:
I really like the style and presentation of the game. Unfortunately, and this is a very minor gripe, during the tutorial the sound was cracking.

The main issue I had was in the first 15 minutes of the main game. I opened a box, which revealed a key (which fell on the floor). I put the box in my bag and during this time, the key disappeared. I retrieved the box from the bag and the key wasn't there, again putting the box back in the bag. I looked around the near vicitinity and no sign of the key. I went to check the box again, and that had now also disappeared from my bag. So I was left with no box or key and leaving me with no alternative but to either quit or restart as I could no longer progress. I quit purely based on that there 'could' be other game breaking bugs deeper in the game, that would really frustrate.

As I said, it has great potential but just needs fixing up and once done, I am willing to revisit the game and score it accordingly.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! I became aware of this nasty bug and have since fixed it as well other tweaks and fixes. Also 2.1d update is out now that address other minor bugs Please visit: https://discord.gg/aNWAu4p8kE for support, suggestions if you need anything at all  e.t.c  As I am always working to bring you all the best experience as possible.

reviews.review_description:
I've played nearly all the abadonware or shareware games, sierra adventure games like the monkey island series, police quest, day of the tentacle and beneath a steel sky to name a few of the many I played when I was young... I absolutely love that type of game so when I heard this game was similar to those types of games it really got me interested so I got this game last night.
I love the reference to old police quest space quest and kings quest games and leisure suit larry games ie Larry laffer... nice

This game is made by a solo developer so give him tons of credit his games runs smoothly and looks amazing you would be mad to miss out on this game.. price is too low for such a masterpiece!!

Can't wait for episode 2 you amazing game writer/developer.... :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the amazing review I am so very glad that you enjoyed it and just wait and see what I have in store for episode 2 and beyond.

reviews.review_description: After multiple installs I’m finally able to start playing the game. I had numerous issues and the developer helped me through them. Haven’t actually played it yet but am off to a good start. I will update this review once I get into game.

developer_response.body: Hello there, I am here to help, for one on one please visit my discord here: https://discord.gg/aNWAu4p8kE and we can get to the bottom of this issue. Talk soon!

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game, definitely need more like this
Good work Gearworx

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your kind words! Just wait and see what I have in store for you in episode 2 ;)
